issue_title: Fixed header now has a resize observer for primary column headers
issue_body_preview:
Previously, column widths were updated only on a window resize event. This ticket makes two changes to that behavior:

1. If the page layout changes without a window resize, columns weren't getting updated. As an example, put a wrapper div around the component. Now change the width on that wrapper
test_description_zh: 在启用固定表头（fixed-header）的 vue-good-table 外层包裹一个 div 容器，动态改变该容器的宽度（例如通过 JavaScript 或 CSS 切换），观察固定表头的列宽是否与表格主体的列宽保持一致对齐。
expected_result_zh: 当外层容器宽度发生变化（即使没有触发 window resize 事件）时，固定表头的各列宽度应自动同步更新，与表格主体列宽精确对齐，不出现错位或宽度不一致的情况。
